function.name: schedule_first_attempt
function.description: Use ONLY when the call has reached someone other than the intended participant AND the number IS the right number for the participant (e.g., a family member answered), AND a concrete time has been agreed for trying the call again. The tool will speak a goodbye and end the call, and a fresh first-attempt call will be scheduled at the suggested time (the participant will hear the full introduction when they answer, since they have not yet spoken to Imani). CRITICAL: Only invoke this tool once you have heard a CONCRETE time from the third party. If the suggested time is vague ('a few hours', 'this evening'), translate it to a concrete time using the vague-time-handling rules and have the third party confirm before invoking.

suggestedTime.description: Concrete natural-language time. Must be a specific time, not a question or vague placeholder.

messages.content: OK, I will try again at the agreed time. Thank you. Goodbye.
